{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20771_1
|class_id=20771
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20771_2
|fame=15
|art=13
|fth=30
|civ=16
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail RUSH +10<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +10<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss2=Snail RUSH +20<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +20<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss3=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss4=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss7=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
